backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing audio post management, user profiles, favorites, comments, and access control using mixins for authorization and blob storage. Provides CRUD operations for audio posts with reply support, user statistics, and permission-based access.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend components including routing, layout, audio playback, upload functionality, authentication, and UI components with detailed styling and behavior descriptions.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining color schemes for UI elements including primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the SPEAKR application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (feed, explore, upload, auth, onboarding, about, contact, help, terms, privacy, dashboard), providers for query client, authentication, and player state, plus onboarding redirect logic.
frontend/src/components/auth/InterestsCh: Checkbox group component for selecting user interests with a two-column grid layout and scrollable container.
frontend/src/components/categories/Categ: Category filter chips component displaying predefined categories as toggleable buttons with premium styling and active state management via feed filters store.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Dashbo: Empty state hero component for dashboard showing welcome message, upload CTA, and UI-only profile completion progress indicator with three steps (account created, profile setup, first upload).
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Favori: Dashboard section displaying user's favorited audio posts in a grid layout, converting backend AudioPost format to MockAudioItem for rendering with AudioCard components.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/MyCont: Displays a user's uploaded audio posts with edit, delete, and play functionality. Includes dialogs for editing post metadata and confirmation for deletion.
frontend/src/components/dashboard/Statis: Shows user statistics including total uploads and total listens in a card layout with icons and formatted numbers.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioCard.t: Main audio post card component with play/pause, favorite, delete, and audio reply functionality. Handles both backend and draft items with authentication checks.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioReplie: Collapsible section that displays audio replies to a post, converting AudioPost objects to MockAudioItem format for rendering.
frontend/src/components/feed/AudioReplyD: Dialog for creating audio replies to posts with title, description, and audio file upload with duration validation and progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/feed/CommentsPan: Displays text comments for an audio post with author avatars and timestamps in a scrollable list.
frontend/src/components/feed/FeedHeroBan: Empty component file for a feed hero banner (no implementation present).
frontend/src/components/feed/ProceduralC: Renders either a custom thumbnail or a procedurally generated category-based cover image for audio items.
frontend/src/components/language/Languag: A multi-select dropdown component for choosing languages with search, custom language addition, and checkbox selection. Displays selected count and integrates with useCustomLanguages hook.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandingB: Displays a centered header banner image with fallback text 'SPEAKR' and includes a top-left dropdown menu. Handles image loading errors gracefully.
A dropdown menu with navigation links to About, Categories, Contact, Help/FAQ, Terms of Service, and Privacy Policy pages using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingB: A fixed floating button in the top-right corner that navigates to the feed home page. Hides when the mini-player is active.
frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingL: A fixed floating button with popover for filtering feed by language, featuring search, custom language addition, and checkbox selection. Hides when mini-player is open.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Main application header with centered logo, menu dropdown, login/logout functionality via Internet Identity, and search bar. Includes navigation and authentication state management.
frontend/src/components/layout/PrimaryNa: Navigation bar with Feed, Explore, and Upload links, highlighting the active route. Uses TanStack Router for navigation.
frontend/src/components/onboarding/Onboa: A multi-step onboarding wizard with progress bar, animated icons, and navigation controls. Guides users through discovering content, sharing voice, and using the player.
frontend/src/components/player/MiniPlaye: A fixed bottom mini-player component that displays the currently playing audio with controls (play/pause, skip, seek, volume), thumbnail, and metadata. Includes a close button and uses the PlayerProvider context for state management.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: A search input component with a search icon that filters audio content and auto-selects the default language when focused or changed if the user hasn't made a language choice.
frontend/src/components/upload/AudioSour: A tabbed component allowing users to either upload an audio file or record audio directly from their microphone, with support for multiple audio formats, 3-hour max duration enforcement, and recording preview functionality.
frontend/src/components/upload/CategoryP: A dropdown combobox component for selecting predefined categories or creating custom categories, with search functionality and keyboard navigation support.
frontend/src/components/upload/UploadFor: A comprehensive audio upload form that handles file/recording selection, metadata input (title, description, category, languages), authentication checks, audio duration validation, and uploads audio posts to the backend with progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/upload/useAudioD: A custom hook that validates audio file duration against a 3-hour maximum limit by loading metadata and returns formatted error messages if the duration is exceeded.
frontend/src/constants/categories.ts: Defines a constant array of predefined audio categories including 'All', 'Entertainment', 'Technology', 'Food', 'Sports', 'Politics', 'Music', and 'Work' with TypeScript type export.
frontend/src/constants/categoryColors.ts: Provides category-to-color mapping functions for consistent theming, including gradient backgrounds and badge variants for each category with light/dark mode support.
frontend/src/constants/interests.ts: Combines base categories (excluding 'All') with additional interests like 'Art & Design', 'Gaming', 'Science', etc., to create a comprehensive interests list for user preferences.
frontend/src/constants/languages.ts: Defines a comprehensive list of 184+ ISO 639-1 language codes with labels, including a special 'none' option for music content.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Manages the backend actor instance with authentication, creating anonymous or authenticated actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioReplies.ts: Fetches audio post replies for a given post ID by filtering the user's content for posts with matching replyTo field.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomLanguages.ts: Manages custom user-added languages stored in localStorage, providing duplicate detection, alphabetical sorting, and combining with built-in languages.
frontend/src/hooks/useFavorites.ts: Fetches the authenticated user's favorite audio posts from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation.
frontend/src/hooks/useMyContent.ts: Fetches user's audio posts and provides mutations for editing and deleting posts with automatic query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnboarding.ts: Manages onboarding completion state in localStorage with methods to mark complete or reset.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides mutations for audio post operations (add, listen, remove) and favorites management (add, remove) with toast notifications and query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useUserStatistics.ts: Fetches user statistics from the backend actor for the authenticated user.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens defining a premium warm-to-cool gradient palette inspired by SPEAKR branding, including light/dark theme variables, typography styles, and glass/card component utilities.
frontend/src/lib/draftFeedItems.ts: Manages draft audio items in localStorage, providing functions to save, retrieve, and remove drafts with file-to-dataURL conversion, plus a subscription mechanism for draft change notifications.
frontend/src/lib/formatters.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers with K/M/B suffixes and converting seconds to MM:SS duration format.
frontend/src/lib/proceduralCovers.ts: Generates deterministic SVG cover images based on category and seed using seeded random number generation, creating unique waveform patterns and gradients for audio items.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility function combining clsx and tailwind-merge for conditional CSS class name merging.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/mock/mockAudio.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for audio items and comments, plus exports an array of six mock audio items with sample data for development.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Simple About page component displaying placeholder content about SPEAKR's mission and vision.
frontend/src/pages/AuthPage.tsx: Authentication page with tabbed login/register forms, including email/password inputs and an interests selection component for registration.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Simple Contact page component displaying placeholder content for future contact information.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page that displays user statistics, favorites, and uploaded content. Redirects unauthenticated users to the feed and shows an empty state hero for new users.
frontend/src/pages/ExplorePage.tsx: Explore page displaying a grid of category cards with procedural cover images. Clicking a category filters the feed and navigates to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Main feed page that displays audio items filtered by search query, category, and language. Combines mock data, draft items, and backend content with language-specific empty states.
frontend/src/pages/HelpPage.tsx: Placeholder help page with a "coming soon" message for guides and FAQ content.
frontend/src/pages/OnboardingPage.tsx: Onboarding page that displays a wizard for new users and marks onboarding complete before navigating to the feed.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Placeholder privacy policy page with a "coming soon" message.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Placeholder terms of service page with a "coming soon" message.
frontend/src/pages/UploadPage.tsx: Upload page that renders the UploadForm component for users to share audio content.
frontend/src/player/PlayerProvider.tsx: React context provider for global audio player state, managing playback, progress, volume, and current item using an HTML5 Audio element.
frontend/src/state/feedFilters.ts: Zustand store for feed filters (search, category, languages) with persistence and auto-selection of browser default language on first load.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from query strings or hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence and cleanup helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system with CSS variables, custom shadows, Inter font family, border radius utilities, and animation keyframes for accordions and speaker pulse effects.
project_state.json: Project state document tracking implemented features for an audio upload web application, including header layout reorganization, favorite/reply buttons for authenticated users, and audio reply threading system with version 17 of the project state.
